description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant, commonly found in urban environments for emergency water access. The hydrant features a domed top with a central operating nut, two prominent side outlets capped and secured with metal chains, and a front-facing outlet for hose attachment. The body is robust and cylindrical, with a flanged base bolted to the ground for stability. The surface is painted a glossy red, with metallic highlights on the bolts and chains, and the texture appears slightly rough due to the cast metal construction. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the exterior, and the hydrant is designed to be highly visible and durable for public safety use.
description: A robust, glossy red fire hydrant with chained side caps and a central operating nut, designed for emergency water access in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main outlet, central operating nut, and both chained side caps clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting one of the chained caps and the cylindrical body, with the main outlet partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hydrant, both side caps, and the flanged base, with no outlets facing forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other chained cap and the main outlet from a different angle.
